spoilers.title: #BCSpoilers guidebook promo says "Luck and ●●● are actually relatives?!" Sounds like Charlotte x Luck half-sibling theory will get confirmed?! After all, their elf counterparts were siblings. That wou
spoilers.text: #BCSpoilers guidebook promo says "Luck and ●●● are actually relatives?!" Sounds like Charlotte x Luck half-sibling theory will get confirmed?! After all, their elf counterparts were siblings. That would make Luck Yami's brother in law...

misc.text: ¡¡¡POR FIN UN NINTENDO DIRECT GENERAL 😍😍😍!!! Nintendo España (@NintendoES) ¡Mañana, 9 de junio, se emite un nuevo #NintendoDirect a las 16:00 (horario peninsular)! misc.title: El cambio se produce en el equivalente al Tomo 42 original, donde no se ponen los nombres originales de los ataques. Creo que es porque habéis copiado los textos de la traducción antigua sin revisarlo
misc.text: El cambio se produce en el equivalente al Tomo 42 original, donde no se ponen los nombres originales de los ataques. Creo que es porque habéis copiado los textos de la traducción antigua sin revisarlos (ya que creo que la edición con traducción revisada llegó hasta el Tomo 41).

misc.title: The best way of Code to redeem himself is by killing off people close to Boruto. Ikemoto needs to hold his balls in his hands and start to write the story with a darker and more emotional tone - Code
misc.text: The best way of Code to redeem himself is by killing off people close to Boruto. Ikemoto needs to hold his balls in his hands and start to write the story with a darker and more emotional tone - Code would be the perfect guy for this… #BORUTO Anime Explained (@NarutoExplained) Code is either going to have the biggest comeback of all time or he’s gonna be taken out like trash the moment someone gets tired of his shit. No in between #boruto #BorutoTwoBlueVortexCh15 — https://nitter.net/NarutoExplained/status/1848037117999383025#m

misc.title: Upcoming Blue Lock KV featuring Isagi & Kaiser. Isagi sits with the ball and a confident grin, while Kaiser stands behind him with his trademark smug look. Neo Egoist League emblem puzzle pieces surro
misc.text: Upcoming Blue Lock KV featuring Isagi & Kaiser. Isagi sits with the ball and a confident grin, while Kaiser stands behind him with his trademark smug look. Neo Egoist League emblem puzzle pieces surround them, with green and purple auras representing Isagi and Kaiser. #BlueLock
